content.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好久不见，最近怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I've been great! I started taking pottery classes last month.
Not bad! I've been busy with work, but I finally started jogging again.
Pretty good! I went on a road trip to the coast last weekend.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的关心并主动分享近况
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态使用恰当（现在完成时）
表达自然度：语气友好，符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体活动细节（如pottery, jogging, road trip）

content.speakerText: Oh wow, hiking? I heard the trails near Blue Mountain are amazing this season.
content.speakerTextCn: 哇，徒步？我听说蓝山步道这季特别棒。
expectedAnswers: Totally! I saw a deer and even a fox—I’d love for you to come with me next time!
Really? I’ve been meaning to go. Do you know which trail is best for beginners?
Yes! The views were unreal. Maybe we can hike together next Saturday?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表现出兴趣并推动对话深入或提出邀请
语言准确性：使用恰当的连接词和口语表达（e.g., 'Totally', 'I've been meaning to'）
表达自然度：语气热情、真实，避免机械式回答
关键词覆盖：是否提及具体体验（deer, views, trail）或邀请行动（come with me, hike together）

content.speakerText: Hi Alex! Haven’t seen you in ages. What’s new with you?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，Alex！好久不见，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I started learning guitar—I’ve been practicing three times a week!
I switched jobs last month and now I’m working remotely from home.
Not much, but I adopted a puppy last weekend—he’s a handful but so cute!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了'What's new'并分享真实生活变化
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态（现在完成时、过去时）和自然表达
表达自然度：语气轻松、有情感，避免简单回答'Nothing'或'Fine'
关键词覆盖：是否包含具体事件（learning guitar, switched jobs, adopted a puppy）
